channel.title: Zfs on Al's Ramblings
channel.description: Recent content in Zfs on Al's Ramblings

item.title: How to use NFS client on Windows 7
How to Shrink zfs root pool.
item.description:
This exercise for me is to replace my current single disk rpool, the second disk was removed for another project, on to two slightly smaller disks. Doing so restores my root mirror but as the disks are slightly smaller some work is required.

For reference my current root pool name is rpool, the current disk in this pool is c5t1d0, the first replacement disk is install at c5t0d0 and is empty.

item.title: DAY 2 LISA 2010 ZFS tut
item.description: Day two the rain has stopped a little bit of Californian sunshine.

item.title: Moving an iscsi zvol to a new pool
item.description: Been working on fixing my 4K sector disk write performance issue, will post something on that later. So I have create a new zpool and after zfs send | zfs receive on the various zfs volumes and filesystem I was left to figure out how to move my iscsi guid’s as follows
